encounter.location: DeKalb Primary Care, 2701 North Decatur Road, Suite 300, Decatur, GA 30033

conditions.name: forehead laceration
conditions.note: Healing cleanly with no signs of infection. No erythema, drainage, or dehiscence.

conditions.name: right wrist contusion
conditions.note: Improving — full range of motion with only mild residual tenderness.

conditions.name: history of mechanical fall
conditions.note: Home safety modifications implemented: grab bars installed, throw rugs removed, nightlight purchased.

medications.name: donepezil 10 mg / memantine 28 mg extended-release capsule

document_references.description: Outbound telephone follow-up call to Margaret Washington-Clarke (authorized representative) five days after Harold's ED visit on 2025-02-08 for a mechanical fall. Margaret reports the forehead laceration is healing without infection and the right wrist contusion has improved with full range of motion. Home safety modifications have been implemented (grab bars, rug removal, nightlight). Plan to continue current medications, monitor for delayed symptoms, and schedule in-person follow-up in 2–3 weeks for chronic disease management and fall prevention counseling.
